steps.title: Fit the line from the table
steps.content: Enter the two table points, $(-18,-48)$ and $(7,52)$, into Desmos and run $y_1 \sim m x_1+b$. Desmos gives $m=4$ and $b=24$, so the line is $y=4x+24$.

steps.title: Evaluate at the requested x-value
steps.content: The graph passes through $\left(\frac{1}{7},a\right)$, so plug in $x=\frac{1}{7}$: $$a=4\left(\frac{1}{7}\right)+24=\frac{4}{7}+\frac{168}{7}=\frac{172}{7}$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: The value of $a$ is $\frac{172}{7}$, which matches choice D.
